scheme_name: "Sugarcane Nursery Premium" Sub-Scheme of the "Crop Production Technology" Scheme
page_title: "Sugarcane Nursery Premium" Sub-Scheme of the "Crop Production Technology" Scheme

details: The "Sugarcane Nursery Premium" Sub-Scheme of the "Crop Production Technology" Scheme is introduced by the Department of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, Union Territory of Puducherry. Through this scheme, the farmers are provided Nursery Premium for Raising Seed Material to Plant One Hectare of Sugarcane.
benefits: Nursery Premium for Raising Seed Material to Plant One Hectare of Sugarcane (10 Ares (25 Cents) of Nursery @ ₹4,000/-)
eligibility: The applicant should be a resident/native of Puducherry.
The applicant should be a Farmer.

online: The interested applicant should visit (during office hours) one of the offices given below, and request the hard copy of the
of the application form from the concerned authority.

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across, if required), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form and the documents to the concerned authority.

On receipt of the application, necessary entries will be made in the application receipt register and a unique number is assigned to the applicant for identifying each applicant which shall be used for all further references and also as acknowledgement for the receipt of the application.

faqs.question: What is the payment amount for the Nursery Premium for Raising Seed Material?
faqs.answer: The Nursery Premium is ₹4,000 for raising seed material to plant one hectare of sugarcane.

faqs.question: Is self-attestation required for the mandatory documents in the application process?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants need to self-attest the mandatory documents when submitting the application.

faqs.question: What is the role of the Agricultural Officers in the application process?
faqs.answer: Agricultural Officers provide the prescribed format of the application form to interested applicants.

faqs.question: Can non-residents of Puducherry apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only residents of Puducherry are eligible to apply for the "Sugarcane Nursery Premium" Sub-Scheme.

faqs.question: What are the specific benefits offered to farmers under this sub-scheme?
faqs.answer: Farmers receive Nursery Premium for Raising Seed Material to Plant One Hectare of Sugarcane at ₹4,000 per 10 Ares of Nursery.

faqs.question: Can farmers apply for the Nursery Premium for multiple hectares of sugarcane nursery?
faqs.answer: Yes, farmers can apply for the Nursery Premium for each hectare of sugarcane nursery, subject to eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: Are there any restrictions on how farmers can utilize the Nursery Premium?
faqs.answer: The Nursery Premium is specifically allocated for raising seed material for sugarcane cultivation and cannot be used for other purposes.

faqs.question: Is the Nursery Premium a one-time payment, or is it provided at different stages of the nursery development?
faqs.answer: The Nursery Premium of ₹4,000 is a one-time payment for raising seed material to plant one hectare of sugarcane.

faqs.question: Can farmers choose the area for raising the sugarcane nursery to avail the Nursery Premium?
faqs.answer: Yes, farmers can choose to raise the nursery on 10 Ares (25 Cents) and receive ₹4,000 as Nursery Premium.

faqs.question: Where can applicants track the status of their application?
faqs.answer: Applicants can track the status of their application at https://edistrict.py.gov.in/User/TrackApplication.aspx.

faqs.question: What are the mandatory fields to be filled in the online application form?
faqs.answer: The application form requires filling in fields marked with a red asterisk, including personal details and necessary documents.

faqs.question: Is there an application deadline for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme guidelines do not mention any opening date or closing date for applications.
